0011010010101101 0110011111110100 1 -> sum: 1001110010100010, cout: 0
1110000101001011 0111001001111000 0 -> sum: 0101001111000011, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
